testcase.name: test_logo_file_is_accessible

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should be an image assert 'image' in 'text/html; charset=utf-8' + where 'text/html; charset=utf-8' = get('content-type', '') + where get = {'Date': 'Fri, 13 Feb 2026 14:13:04 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'CF-Ray': '9cd4ec9f1bcd6179-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'Vary': 'Accept-Encoding', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'access-control-allow-headers': '*', 'access-control-allow-methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'x-powered-by': 'Express', 'Server': 'cloudflare'}.get + where {'Date': 'Fri, 13 Feb 2026 14:13:04 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'CF-Ray': '9cd4ec9f1bcd6179-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'Vary': 'Accept-Encoding', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'access-control-allow-headers': '*', 'access-control-allow-methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'x-powered-by': 'Express', 'Server': 'cloudflare'} = <Response [200]>.headers

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_clinikq_phase3.py:97: in test_logo_file_is_accessible assert "image" in file_response.headers.get("content-type", ""), "Response should be an image" E AssertionError: Response should be an image E assert 'image' in 'text/html; charset=utf-8' E + where 'text/html; charset=utf-8' = get('content-type', '') E + where get = {'Date': 'Fri, 13 Feb 2026 14:13:04 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'CF-Ray': '9cd4ec9f1bcd6179-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'Vary': 'Accept-Encoding', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'access-control-allow-headers': '*', 'access-control-allow-methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'x-powered-by': 'Express', 'Server': 'cloudflare'}.get E + where {'Date': 'Fri, 13 Feb 2026 14:13:04 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'CF-Ray': '9cd4ec9f1bcd6179-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'Vary': 'Accept-Encoding', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'access-control-allow-headers': '*', 'access-control-allow-methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'x-powered-by': 'Express', 'Server': 'cloudflare'} = <Response [200]>.headers
